narrative:
Precinct Streetsboro 4-A (precinct in Portage County) has 750 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
